name: YouTube video summarizer
description: Takes a YouTube URL, scrapes the page content with Firecrawl to extract transcript and metadata, uses Claude AI to generate a comprehensive summary with key takeaways, and posts the summary to Slack.

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the summary

steps.name: Scrape YouTube video page with Firecrawl
Build Slack Block Kit video summary
